\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3817 introduces Underspecified Equation (Pending Review) as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathbf{p}_{i,k} = r_{i,k} \, \mathbf{n}_i, \quad r_{i,k} = e^{t_{i,k}}. \]
